changeSet.author: dinht
changeSet.sql: CREATE GLOBAL TEMPORARY TABLE "TMP_KPI_VAL" ( "CI_BR_ID" VARCHAR2(128), "CI_BR_SCORE_VALUE" NUMBER, "BENCHMARK_VALUE" VARCHAR2(128), "BENCHMARK_DESC" VARCHAR2(4000), "STAT_SCORE_GROUP_CODE" VARCHAR2(64), "GROUP_WEIGHT_SCORE" NUMBER, "GROUP_SCORE_VALUE" NUMBER, "GROUP_RAW_SCORE" NUMBER, "KPI_CODE" VARCHAR2(32), "KPI_VALUE" NUMBER, "SCORE_VALUE" NUMBER, "RESULT_NAME" VARCHAR2(128), "KPI_WEIGHT_SCORE" NUMBER ) ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;
